creator: ak@FreeBSD.org
text:
Proper, actually tested patch:

Index: /etc/rc.subr
@@ -930,7 +930,8 @@
                else
                        _pidcmd='rc_pid=$(check_process '"$_procname $command_interpreter"')'
                fi
-               if [ -n "$_pidcmd" ]; then
+               eval "$_pidcmd"
+               if [ -n "$rc_pid" ]; then
                        _keywords="${_keywords} status poll"
                fi
        fi
